texto: They took to walking and chatting in a park close to the house. Charles was flattered by the attention he was given by Edina. He had never had a girlfriend and smiled at the eagerness of this blossoming young woman. One evening, as they walked in the park. Charles took Edina's hand in his, and immediately the fire in his belly was lit."So, what is it you want to do, Edina?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Barbara Warren que provoca limites e escolhas conscientes. Ao questionar “They took to walking and chatting in a park close to the house. Charles was flattered by the atte…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre amor, historical-romance, memoir, com foco em termino e luto.
